data.title: Relaxed Cotton Poplin Shirt
data.description: The definitive white shirt, reimagined with a relaxed contemporary fit. Cut from crisp organic cotton poplin with a subtle sheen. The slightly dropped shoulder and curved hem allow for versatile styling, worn open as a layer or buttoned for polish. Mother-of-pearl buttons throughout.

images.alt: White cotton poplin shirt laid flat showing relaxed silhouette
Detail of mother-of-pearl buttons on cotton shirt
Model wearing white poplin shirt with dropped shoulders
Cotton shirt styled open as a layering piece
